title: ClickUp vs Evernote
description: Compare ClickUp vs Evernote — a project management platform versus a productivity solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: ClickUp (Project Management) and Evernote (Productivity) serve different primary purposes. ClickUp has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is project management or productivity capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between ClickUp and Evernote?
faqs.answer: ClickUp is a project management tool, while Evernote is a productivity platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can ClickUp replace Evernote?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, ClickUp or Evernote?
faqs.answer: ClickUp (Free–$19/user/mo) and Evernote ($10-20/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
